_comment: Persona-contextual metric definitions. Same question, different answer depending on who asks.

definitions.definition: Active billing entities with at least one paid invoice in the last 12 months
definitions.calculation_method: COUNT(DISTINCT billing_entity_id) WHERE last_invoice_date > NOW() - INTERVAL '12 months'

definitions.definition: Active accounts with at least one open opportunity or active subscription
definitions.calculation_method: COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) WHERE has_active_opportunity = true OR has_active_subscription = true

definitions.definition: Accounts with active support contracts or SLA agreements
definitions.calculation_method: COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) WHERE has_support_contract = true OR has_sla = true

definitions.definition: Accounts with active API integrations or platform connections
GAAP recognized revenue, net of returns and allowances
Booked revenue from closed-won deals including services
Total value of all open opportunities including new and expansion
Weighted pipeline value using stage-probability forecasting
definitions.calculation_method: SUM(amount * stage_probability) WHERE stage NOT IN ('Closed-Won', 'Closed-Lost')
